title: Pinning Boards, Workspaces, etc. to the left menu bar
excerpt: As title says. It’d be really cool if I could pin a board or workspaces on that left menu bar in monday.com so I can easily access boards with less clicks.

posts.author: parkerbkim (Parker Bokyung Kim)
posts.cookedHtml: As title says. It’d be really cool if I could pin a board or workspaces on that left menu bar in monday.com so I can easily access boards with less clicks.

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m interested in this feature as well. When you are in a board, next to the title there is the ability to favorite the board, but it would be helpful if the favorite boards went to the top of the left side bar or if there was a favorites folder/tab that is easy to navigate to

posts.author: rasarch (Rachel Story)
posts.cookedHtml: We would also like to have this feature - we have staff who accidentally drag and drop boards down the list a lot… would be great to be able to pin a few key boards or folders to the top so they can’t accidentally be dragged down.
